CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, str1 VARCHAR(100), str2 VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (3, 'Bank', 'MonetDB is a Database');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (4, 'XYZ', 'Not Found Here');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (6, '', 'Empty String Check');
SELECT locate(str1, str2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT locate('Bank', str2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT locate('XYZ', str2) AS position FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT locate(str1, 'DB') AS position FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3);
SELECT id, locate(str1, str2) AS position FROM test_strings WHERE str1 <> '';
SELECT id, str1, str2 FROM test_strings WHERE locate(str1, str2) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE locate(str1, str2) = 0;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE locate('DB', str2) > 0 ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, locate(str1, str2) FROM test_strings WHERE locate(str1, str2) > 0 UNION SELECT id, 0 FROM test_strings WHERE locate(str1, str2) = 0;
SELECT str1, COUNT(*) FROM test_strings GROUP BY str1 HAVING locate(str1, str2) > 0;
